TweakWhy_AccountProtectionWarn: Tsaron Windows yana nuna gargadi idan ba ka shiga da asusun Microsoft ba. Kashe yana ɓoye wannan maimaitawar sanarwar.
TweakWhy_ActiveHours: Yana bayyana kewayon lokacin lokacin da Windows ba za ta sake kunna PC ɗin ta atomatik don gama shigar da sabuntawa ba.
TweakWhy_ActivityHistory: Yana rikodin ayyukanku a cikin na'urori lokacin shiga cikin asusun Microsoft kuma yana iya daidaita shi zuwa gajimare. Kashewa yana kiyaye ayyuka na gida.
TweakWhy_AdminApprovalMode: Controls how User Account Control behaves when an app requests elevated privileges. Abin da aka sako prompts for consent, Never disables UAC prompts. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_AdobeNetworkBlock: Yana ƙara dokokin Firewall don toshe aikace-aikacen Adobe shiga intanet. Wannan yana rinjayar ingancin lasisi, daidaitawar gajimare, da fasalulluka na Cloud Cloud. Wannan babban canji ne mai haɗari wanda zai iya zama mai wahala ko ba zai yuwu a juyo ba.
TweakWhy_AdvancedStartupShortcut: Ƙirƙirar gajeriyar hanya ta tebur wacce nan da nan ta sake yin PC cikin menu na Zaɓuɓɓukan Farawa na Babba (Muhalli na Farko na Windows).
TweakWhy_AdvertisingID: Windows yana ba da ID ɗin talla na musamman ga asusunku wanda ƙa'idodin za su iya amfani da su don nuna tallace-tallacen da aka yi niyya. Kashewa yana dakatar da wannan bin diddigin.
TweakWhy_AeroShaking: Shaking a window title bar minimizes all other open windows. Kashe if you find this triggers by accident during normal use.
TweakWhy_AppColorMode: Sets the default color mode that applications use when they respect the system setting: Duhu or Haske.
TweakWhy_AppsLanguageSwitch: Yana ba da damar Windows don tunawa da canzawa zuwa yaren shigarwa daban ko shimfidar madannai a kowace taga aikace-aikace.
TweakWhy_AppsSilentInstalling: Windows na iya shigar da ƙa'idodin da aka ba da shawara a baya ba tare da tambayar ku ba. Kashewa yana dakatar da wannan hali. Wannan canjin yana ɗaukar matsakaiciyar haɗari kuma yana iya shafar wasu ayyukan aiki.
TweakWhy_AppsSmartScreen: SmartScreen yana bincika fayilolin da aka zazzage da ƙa'idodi akan bayanan martabar gajimare kuma yana gargaɗe ku kafin aiwatar da abubuwan da ba a san su ba. Wannan canjin yana ɗaukar matsakaiciyar haɗari kuma yana iya shafar wasu ayyukan aiki.
TweakWhy_Autoplay: Yana sarrafa ko Windows yana buɗe faɗakarwa ta atomatik ko ƙaddamar da ƙa'idar lokacin da kuka saka kebul na USB ko wasu kafofin watsa labarai masu cirewa.
TweakWhy_AutoRebootOnCrash: Lokacin da Windows ta fashe (allon blue), zai iya sake farawa ta atomatik. Kashewa yana kiyaye kuskuren akan allo don ku iya karanta lambar tsayawa.
TweakWhy_BackgroundApps: Yana sarrafa ko an yarda apps suyi aiki da sabuntawa a bango lokacin da ba a mayar da hankali ba. Kashewa yana adana CPU da ƙwaƙwalwar ajiya. Wannan babban canji ne mai haɗari wanda zai iya zama mai wahala ko ba zai yuwu a juyo ba.
TweakWhy_BingSearch: Akwatin bincike na Fara Menu na iya nuna sakamakon gidan yanar gizon Bing tare da sakamakon gida. Kashewa yana kiyaye fara Menu na gida kawai.
TweakWhy_BootRecovery: Yana sarrafa ko Windows ta shiga yanayin dawowa ta atomatik bayan yunƙurin taya da aka gaza jere. Wannan canjin yana ɗaukar matsakaiciyar haɗari kuma yana iya shafar wasu ayyukan aiki.
TweakWhy_BraveDebloat: Kashes Brave browser's optional extras: rewards, crypto wallet, VPN, and AI chat. A bajely affects these Brave-specific features, not your browsing. This is a high-risk change that may be difficult or impossible to reverse.
TweakWhy_BSoDStopError: Nunas the specific error code on the blue screen of death instead of just the generic sad face emoji.
TweakWhy_BuildNumberOnDesktop: Nuna lambar ginin Windows da bugu azaman alamar ruwa a kusurwar dama ta tebur ɗin ku.
TweakWhy_CABInstallContext: Adds an Sawa option to the right-click context menu for .cab archive files.
TweakWhy_Camera: Jagoran jujjuyawar sarrafa ko ƙa'idodi na iya buƙatar samun dama ga kyamarar ku. Kashewa yana hana duk aikace-aikacen yin amfani da kamara. Wannan canjin yana ɗaukar matsakaiciyar haɗari kuma yana iya shafar wasu ayyukan aiki.
TweakWhy_CapsLock: Yana sarrafa ko an kunna maɓallin Kulle Caps. Kashe taswirar Maɓallin Maɓalli don haka danna shi baya yin komai.
TweakWhy_ChangingSoundScheme: Yana sarrafa ko masu amfani zasu iya canza tsarin sauti na Windows. Kashe wannan yana kulle tsarin na yanzu kuma yana hana canje-canje.
TweakWhy_CheckBoxes: Nunas small checkboxes next to files and folders in Explorer to make it easier to select multiple items without holding Ctrl.
TweakWhy_CheckWinGet: WinGet shine mai sarrafa fakitin da aka gina a cikin Windows wanda ake amfani dashi don shigarwa da sabunta ƙa'idodi daga layin umarni. Wannan yana tabbatar da shigar da shi kuma har zuwa yau.
TweakWhy_CIMemoryIntegrity: Ƙaƙƙarfan lambar da ke da kariya ta Hypervisor tana gudanar da lambar kwaya ta Windows a cikin yanayi mai ƙima don hana matakin kernel malware da rootkits. Wannan canjin yana ɗaukar matsakaiciyar haɗari kuma yana iya shafar wasu ayyukan aiki.
TweakWhy_ClearRecentFiles: Yana share lissafin fayilolin kwanan nan ta atomatik duk lokacin da ka fita. Yana haɓaka keɓantawa akan na'urori masu amfani ko masu amfani da yawa.
TweakWhy_ClipboardHistory: Stores a history of copied items so you can paste from previous clips using Win+V. Buje to turn this feature on.
TweakWhy_CompressedFolderNewContext: Nunas or hides the Compressed (zipped) Folder option in the right-click New submenu in File Explorer.
TweakWhy_ConnectionSharing: Yana ba da damar wannan PC ɗin don raba haɗin intanet ɗinta tare da wasu na'urori, yana aiki azaman matattarar software. Kunna yana nuna wannan zaɓi a saitunan cibiyar sadarwa. Wannan canjin yana ɗaukar matsakaiciyar haɗari kuma yana iya shafar wasu ayyukan aiki.
TweakWhy_ControlPanelView: Yana saita tsarin nuni na tsoho don Panel Control zuwa Manyan Gumaka, Ƙananan Gumaka, ko tsoho rukunin Rukunin.
TweakWhy_Copilot: Yana cire Copilot, Tunawa, da duk abubuwan haɗin Windows AI masu alaƙa. Sake sakawa yana buƙatar samun dama ta Winget ko Shagon Microsoft.
TweakWhy_CortanaAutostart: Yana hana Cortana ƙaddamarwa ta atomatik a farawa. Har yanzu ana iya buɗe Cortana da hannu idan an buƙata.
TweakWhy_CreateRestorePoint: Yana ƙirƙira wurin Mayar da Tsarin Windows don ku iya jujjuya canje-canjen tsarin idan wani abu ya ɓace. An ba da shawarar kafin gudanar da kowane tweaks.
TweakWhy_CrossDeviceResume: Lets you resume tasks from other Windows devices on this PC via a notification pop-up. Kashe if you do not use this cross-device feature.
TweakWhy_CurrentNetwork: Yana saita bayanin martabar cibiyar sadarwar don haɗin ku mai aiki a halin yanzu. Masu zaman kansu suna ba da damar gano hanyar sadarwa da rabawa, Jama'a suna taƙaita shi. Wannan canjin yana ɗaukar matsakaiciyar haɗari kuma yana iya shafar wasu ayyukan aiki.
TweakWhy_DefaultTerminalApp: Saita wace aikace-aikacen tasha ke buɗewa lokacin da kuka ƙaddamar da Umurnin Saurin ko PowerShell daga cikin Windows.
TweakWhy_DefenderAppGuard: Yana buɗe shafukan burauzar Edge a cikin keɓantaccen na'ura don hana mugayen gidajen yanar gizo shiga tsarin runduna ko fayilolin sa. Wannan canjin yana ɗaukar matsakaiciyar haɗari kuma yana iya shafar wasu ayyukan aiki.
TweakWhy_DefenderCloud: Bujes Microsoft Defender's cloud-based protection for real-time threat lookups using Microsoft's global threat intelligence database. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_DefenderSandbox: Yana gudanar da injin riga-kafi na Microsoft Defender a cikin keɓantaccen tsari na akwatin yashi don ƙarin kariya. Yana ƙara ƙaramin aikin sama sama. Wannan canjin yana ɗaukar matsakaiciyar haɗari kuma yana iya shafar wasu ayyukan aiki.
TweakWhy_DefenderTrayIcon: Nunas or hides the Windows Security (Defender) icon in the system tray. Hiding it does not disable Defender protection.
TweakWhy_DeliveryOptimization: Windows na iya amfani da PC ɗin ku don raba bayanan zazzagewar Windows Update tare da wasu kwamfutoci akan hanyar sadarwar ku ko intanit. Kashe abubuwan zazzagewar ku yana sirri. Wannan canjin yana ɗaukar matsakaiciyar haɗari kuma yana iya shafar wasu ayyukan aiki.
TweakWhy_DEPOptOut: Yana saita Rigakafin Kisa Data zuwa yanayin Ficewa, yana ba da damar kariya ta DEP ga duk matakai sai waɗanda ka keɓe a sarari. Wannan canjin yana ɗaukar matsakaiciyar haɗari kuma yana iya shafar wasu ayyukan aiki.
TweakWhy_DiagnosticDataLevel: Yana sarrafa adadin bayanan bincike da Windows ke aika wa Microsoft. Mafi ƙanƙanta yana aika bayanan asali na na'ura kawai da bayanan dogaro.
TweakWhy_DiagTrackService: Sabis na DiagTrack yana tattarawa da loda amfanin Windows da bayanan bincike zuwa sabobin Microsoft. Kashe shi yana dakatar da ɗorawa na telemetry na baya. Wannan canjin yana ɗaukar matsakaiciyar haɗari kuma yana iya shafar wasu ayyukan aiki.
TweakWhy_DisableAESCiphers: Kashes older weak AES cipher entries in the Windows SCHANNEL security layer. Forces applications to negotiate stronger cipher configurations. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_DisableAutoRun: Yana hana Windows gudanar da shirye-shirye ta atomatik akan faifan USB da sauran kafofin watsa labarai masu ciruwa. Yana dakatar da ɓarna gama gari.
TweakWhy_DisableHashAlgorithms: Configures SCHANNEL hash algorithm settings. Kashes MD5 and enables SHA family algorithms for stronger integrity verification. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_DisableIPv6: Kashes the IPv6 protocol stack system-wide. Ana ba da shawarar if your network does not use IPv6 to reduce unnecessary attack surface. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_DisableRC2RC4Ciphers: Kashes RC2 and RC4 ciphers in SCHANNEL. These algorithms are cryptographically broken and should not be used in any TLS connection. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_DisableRemoteCommands: DCOM ƙa'idar kunnawa nesa ce da kayan aikin sarrafa masana'antu (SCCM, WMI) ke buƙata. Kashe shi yana rage saman kai hari amma yana iya karya ayyukan sarrafa nesa.
TweakWhy_DisableSMBv3Compression: Turns off SMB compression to protect against CVE-2020-0796. A bajely affects SMB traffic compression, not file access speed. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_DisableTCPTimestamps: Yana cire bayanan tambarin TCP daga fakitin cibiyar sadarwa. Yana Hana tsarin nesa daga buga yatsa na OS naka dangane da lokacin aiki. Wannan canjin yana ɗaukar matsakaiciyar haɗari kuma yana iya shafar wasu ayyukan aiki.
TweakWhy_DisableTripleDESCipher: Kashes Triple DES (3DES) in SCHANNEL. 3DES is vulnerable to SWEET32 birthday attacks and is no longer considered secure. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_DiskCleanup: Yana gudanar da ginanniyar kayan aikin Tsabtace Disk na Windows don cire fayilolin wucin gadi, cache na tsarin, da sauran bayanan da ba a buƙata don 'yantar da sarari diski. Wannan canjin yana ɗaukar matsakaiciyar haɗari kuma yana iya shafar wasu ayyukan aiki.
TweakWhy_DismissMSAccount: Yana kawar da maimaituwar faɗakarwa a cikin Tsaron Windows yana neman ka shiga da asusun Microsoft don ƙarin kariya.
TweakWhy_DismissSmartScreenFilter: Yana kawar da maimaituwar faɗakarwa a cikin Tsaron Windows yana tambayarka don kunna tace suna na SmartScreen.
TweakWhy_DNSoverHTTPS: Yana ɓoye binciken binciken DNS ta hanyar aika su akan HTTPS maimakon UDP bayyananne. Yana Hana ISP ko hanyar sadarwar ku daga saka idanu ko yin lalata da zirga-zirgar DNS. Wannan canjin yana ɗaukar matsakaiciyar haɗari kuma yana iya shafar wasu ayyukan aiki.
TweakWhy_DownloadBlocking: Yana sarrafa ko Tsaron Windows yana yiwa fayilolin da aka sauke alama a matsayin mai yuwuwar rashin lafiya ta amfani da madadin bayanan Zone.Identifier.
TweakWhy_EdgeDebloat: Yana Aiwatar da Saitunan Manufofin Ƙungiya don kashe telemetry, mataimakin sayayya, tarawa, ma'aunin gefe na Copilot, da sauran ƙarin abubuwan Edge na zaɓi. Wannan babban canji ne mai haɗari wanda zai iya zama mai wahala ko ba zai yuwu a juyo ba.
TweakWhy_EditWithClipchampContext: Nunas or hides the Edit with Clipchamp video editor option in the right-click context menu for video files.
TweakWhy_EditWithPaintContext: Nunas or hides the Edit with Paint option in the right-click context menu for image files.
TweakWhy_EditWithPhotosContext: Nunas or hides the Edit with Photos option in the right-click context menu for image files.
TweakWhy_EnableBiometricsAntiSpoofing: Bujes enhanced anti-spoofing for Windows Hello facial recognition. A bajely applies if you have compatible biometric hardware.
TweakWhy_EnableSMBGuestCompatibility: Yana ba da damar haɗin SMB zuwa hannun jari na cibiyar sadarwa ba tare da buƙatar tabbaci ba. Ana buƙatar samun dama ga tsofaffin na'urorin NAS, firintoci, ko masu amfani da hanyar sadarwa. Wannan canjin yana ɗaukar matsakaiciyar haɗari kuma yana iya shafar wasu ayyukan aiki.
TweakWhy_EncCompFilesColor: Nunas encrypted files in green and compressed files in blue in File Explorer. Makes these file types immediately identifiable.
TweakWhy_EnhPointerPrecision: Mouse acceleration that adjusts cursor speed based on how fast you physically move the mouse. Kashe for consistent raw mouse input, recommended for gaming.
TweakWhy_ErrorReporting: Lokacin da aikace-aikacen ya yi karo, Rahoton Kuskuren Windows na iya aika rahoto zuwa Microsoft. Kashewa yana dakatar da wannan bayanan daga barin injin ku.
TweakWhy_EventViewerCustomView: Yana ƙirƙirar ra'ayi na al'ada a cikin Mai duba Event wanda aka tace don nuna abubuwan ƙirƙirar tsari, yana sauƙaƙa duba abubuwan da aka ƙaddamar.
TweakWhy_ExplorerAutoDiscovery: Mai Binciken Fayil yana gano nau'in abun ciki na kowace babban fayil kuma yana amfani da samfurin kallo mai dacewa. Kashe duk manyan fayiloli zuwa daidaitaccen ra'ayi na gabaɗaya.
TweakWhy_ExplorerTitleFullPath: Nunas the complete folder path in the File Explorer title bar instead of just the folder name. Useful when working with many folders of the same name.
TweakWhy_F1HelpPage: Danna F1 a cikin Fayil Explorer ko akan tebur yana buɗe gidan yanar gizon taimakon Windows a cikin burauzar ku. Kashewa yana hana ƙaddamar da wannan burauzar.
TweakWhy_F8BootMenu: Bujes the legacy F8 key boot menu that lets you select Safe Mode and other startup options during the Windows boot process.
TweakWhy_FastStartup: Yanayin rufewa matasan da ke ajiye yanayin kernel zuwa faifai don Windows ta yi sauri. Zai iya haifar da matsala tare da saitin taya biyu ko cikakken rufewa.
TweakWhy_FeedbackFrequency: Yana sarrafa sau nawa Windows ke tambayarka don kimanta ƙwarewarka ko ƙaddamar da martani. Saitin zuwa Karɓa yana dakatar da duk tsokaci.
TweakWhy_FileDeleteConfirm: Nunas a confirmation dialog before permanently deleting a file. Buje to get a prompt before files are sent to the Recycle Bin.
TweakWhy_FileExplorerCompactMode: Yana rage tazara tsakanin abubuwa a cikin Fayil Explorer don ƙarami, ƙarin duba lissafin wadataccen bayani.
TweakWhy_FileExtensions: Nunas the file extension (e.g. .txt, .exe) after every filename in Explorer. Helps identify what type a file is at a glance.
TweakWhy_FileOperationsDetails: Nunas the detailed progress dialog for file operations (copy, move, delete) by default instead of the minimal progress bar.
TweakWhy_FileTransferDialog: Yana sarrafa ko kwafin fayil ɗin da matsar magana yana nuna cikakkun bayanai kamar gudu da saura lokacin ta tsohuwa.
TweakWhy_Firewall: Bujes or disables Windows Defender Firewall across all network profiles. Disabling leaves all inbound ports completely unfiltered. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_FirstLogonAnimation: Nunas a brief welcome animation and the Hi screen the first time you sign in after a major Windows update.
TweakWhy_FldrSeparateProcess: Yana buɗe kowane babban fayil ɗin Explorer a cikin nasa tsarin. Idan daya ya yi karo, sauran su zauna a bude. Yana amfani da žarin ƙwaƙwalwar ajiya.
TweakWhy_FolderGroupBy: Yana sarrafa ko an haɗa fayiloli a cikin babban fayil ɗin Zazzagewa ta kwanan wata. Saitin zuwa Babu yana nuna duk fayiloli a jerin fa'ida.
TweakWhy_FullscreenOptimizations: Fasalin Windows wanda ke haɓaka wasanni da ƙa'idodin da ke gudana cikin yanayin cikakken allo don ingantaccen aiki. Kashewa na iya gyara matsalolin daidaitawa a wasu tsoffin wasannin.
TweakWhy_GameDVR: Rikodin bango yana ci gaba da ɗaukar wasan kwaikwayo don ku iya ajiye ƴan mintuna na ƙarshe bayan wani abu ya faru. Kashewa yana 'yantar da kayan aikin GPU da faifai don ingantaccen daidaiton FPS.
TweakWhy_GPUScheduling: Tsare-tsare-tsare-tsare na GPU yana ba GPU damar sarrafa nata ƙwaƙwalwar ajiyar bidiyo kai tsaye, mai yuwuwar rage jinkirin shigarwa cikin wasanni.
TweakWhy_Hibernation: Yana adana duk abinda ke cikin RAM zuwa faifai kuma yana kashe PC gaba ɗaya. Fayil na hibernation na iya amfani da gigabytes da yawa na sararin faifai.
TweakWhy_HiddenItems: Nunas files and folders that are marked as hidden in File Explorer. Hidden items appear slightly transparent when visible.
TweakWhy_HomeGroups: Rukunin Gida shine fasalin Windows don raba fayiloli tsakanin PC na gida. An cire shi a ciki Windows 10 1803 amma sauran sabis na iya kasancewa a nan.
TweakWhy_ImportExploitProtectionPolicy: Ana zazzagewa da shigo da fayil ɗin ƙayyadaddun ƙayyadaddun amfani da aka riga aka gina a cikin Windows Defender Exploit Guard, da amfani da ragi na al'ada. Wannan babban canji ne mai haɗari wanda zai iya zama mai wahala ko ba zai yuwu a juyo ba.
TweakWhy_InputMethod: Yana saita tsohuwar hanyar shigar da madannai da Windows ke amfani da ita. Turanci yana tilasta shimfidar Ingilishi ba tare da la'akari da wasu harsunan da aka shigar ba.
TweakWhy_JPEGWallpapersQuality: Windows yana matsar da fuskar bangon waya JPEG lokacin saita su azaman bangon tebur. Saitin zuwa Max yana adana cikakken ingancin hoto.
TweakWhy_LanguageListAccess: Allows websites to read your Windows language preference list to tailor content. Kashe to prevent websites from detecting your language settings.
TweakWhy_LanmanWorkstationGuestAuthPolic: Guest authentication for SMB is a known lateral-movement vector disabled by default since Windows 10 1709. Enabling it exposes the system to unauthenticated SMB access. A bajely enable for legacy device compatibility.
TweakWhy_LatestInstalled.NET: Ƙaddamar da aikace-aikacen 32-bit da 64-bit don amfani da sabuwar shigar .NET runtime version maimakon sigar da aka gina musu tun asali.
TweakWhy_LLMNR: Haɗin-Local Multicast Name Resolution yana warware sunayen masu masaukin baki akan cibiyoyin sadarwar gida. Ana iya yin amfani da shi a cikin harin kamawa kuma ya fi kyau a kashe shi. Wannan canjin yana ɗaukar matsakaiciyar haɗari kuma yana iya shafar wasu ayyukan aiki.
TweakWhy_LocalSecurityAuthority: Runs the Windows LSA process in protected mode to prevent credential theft by tools like Mimikatz. Ana ba da shawarar for all systems. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_LocationService: Yana sarrafa ko ƙa'idodin za su iya shiga wurin wurin na'urar ku. Kashewa yana hana sa ido akan duk ƙa'idodi. Wannan canjin yana ɗaukar matsakaiciyar haɗari kuma yana iya shafar wasu ayyukan aiki.
TweakWhy_LockScreen: Yana sarrafa ko an nuna allon makullin Windows kafin allon shiga akan Windows 11.
TweakWhy_LockScreenBlur: Yana aiwatar da tasirin acrylic blur zuwa bangon allo na sa hannu. Kashewa yana nuna bangon baya ba tare da bluring ba.
TweakWhy_LockScreenRS1: Yana sarrafa ko an nuna allon kulle Windows kafin allon shiga akan Windows 10 (hanyar manufofin zamanin RS1).
TweakWhy_LockWidgets: Kunshin Kwarewar Yanar Gizon Windows yana ƙara widget da abun ciki mai ƙarfi zuwa allon kulle da mashaya ɗawainiya. Kashewa yana cire waɗannan.
TweakWhy_MaintenanceWakeUp: Windows na iya tayar da PC ɗinka daga barci na dare don gudanar da ayyukan kulawa ta atomatik. Kashewa yana hana farkawa na dare maras so.
TweakWhy_MapUpdates: Taswirorin Windows na iya sauke sabunta bayanan taswirar layi ta atomatik a bango. Kashe yana adana bandwidth idan ba ka yi amfani da app ɗin taswira ba.
TweakWhy_MeetNow: Alamar Haɗu Yanzu a cikin yankin sanarwa
TweakWhy_MergeConflicts: Nunas a warning when merging folders that contain files with the same name. Kashe to silently overwrite files without a prompt.
TweakWhy_Microphone: Jagoran jujjuya sarrafa ko apps na iya buƙatar samun dama ga makirufo. Kashewa yana hana duk ƙa'idodi daga amfani da mic. Wannan canjin yana ɗaukar matsakaiciyar haɗari kuma yana iya shafar wasu ayyukan aiki.
TweakWhy_MostUsedApps: Nunas your most frequently launched apps at the top of the Start Menu app list for quick access.
TweakWhy_MostUsedStartApps: Mafi yawan aikace-aikacen da aka yi amfani da su a Fara
TweakWhy_MouseAcceleration: Haɓaka Ma'aunin Ma'auni na Ma'auni na linzamin kwamfuta bisa sauri. Kashewa yana ba da 1:1 danyen shigar shigar da ƙwararrun ƴan wasan FPS suka fi so don maƙasudin manufa.
TweakWhy_MSIExtractContext: Yana ƙara zaɓin Extract zuwa menu na mahallin danna dama don fayilolin mai sakawa .msi, yana ba ku damar bincika abubuwan da ke cikin su ba tare da kunna mai sakawa ba.
TweakWhy_MSNetClient: Abokin Intanet na Microsoft wanda ke ba da damar wannan PC don samun damar fayiloli da firintocin da wasu kwamfutocin Windows suka raba akan hanyar sadarwa. Wannan canjin yana ɗaukar matsakaiciyar haɗari kuma yana iya shafar wasu ayyukan aiki.
TweakWhy_MultiplaneOverlay: Siffar haɗar GPU wacce zata iya haɓaka aiki. Kashewa na iya gyara kurakurai na gani ko kyalkyali a wasu saitunan nuni.
TweakWhy_MultipleInvokeContext: Lokacin zabar fayiloli 15 ko fiye da danna-dama, Windows yawanci yana nuna gargaɗi kafin nuna menu na mahallin. Wannan yana ɗagawa ko cire iyakar.
TweakWhy_NaglesAlgorithm: Reduces network buffering so packets are sent immediately. Can lower latency in competitive multiplayer, but may affect connection stability on some networks. Kashe if you notice connection drops.
TweakWhy_NavigationPaneExpand: Fannin kewayawa na Explorer yana faɗaɗa ta atomatik kuma yana gungurawa don haskaka babban fayil ɗin da kuke kallo a halin yanzu.
TweakWhy_NavPaneAllFolders: Nunas all local folders including hidden system folders in the Explorer left navigation pane.
TweakWhy_NavPaneLibraries: Nunas the Libraries section (Documents, Music, Pictures, Videos) in the Explorer left navigation pane.
TweakWhy_NCSIProbe: Matsayin Haɗin Sadarwar Sadarwar Yanar Gizo yana bincika haɗin kai ta hanyar yin ping sabar Microsoft. Kashewa na iya nuna alamun halin cibiyar sadarwa mara daidai. Wannan canjin yana ɗaukar matsakaiciyar haɗari kuma yana iya shafar wasu ayyukan aiki.
TweakWhy_NetBIOS: NetBIOS tsohuwar yarjejeniya ce ta ƙudurin suna da ake amfani da ita don raba fayil ɗin Windows. Kashe hanyoyin sadarwa na zamani yana rage zirga-zirgar watsa shirye-shiryen da ba dole ba. Wannan canjin yana ɗaukar matsakaiciyar haɗari kuma yana iya shafar wasu ayyukan aiki.
TweakWhy_NetDevicesAutoInst: Yana sarrafa ko Windows yana saukewa ta atomatik kuma yana shigar da direbobi don sababbin na'urorin cibiyar sadarwar da aka haɗa.
TweakWhy_NetworkAdaptersSavePower: Yana ba da damar Windows don sanya adaftar cibiyar sadarwa zuwa yanayin ƙarancin ƙarfi lokacin da ba a aiki. Kashewa yana hana ɗan gajeren jinkirin sake haɗawa bayan adaftar ta farka.
TweakWhy_NetworkDiscovery: Bujes this PC to find other devices on the local network and be visible to them. Required for browsing network shares in File Explorer. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_NetworkFromLockScreen: Yana sarrafa ko maɓallin zaɓin hanyar sadarwa yana bayyane akan allon kulle kafin mai amfani ya shiga.
TweakWhy_NetworkProtection: Kariyar hanyar sadarwa ta Microsoft Defender tana toshe haɗin kai zuwa sanannun yankuna masu mugunta da adiresoshin IP a matakin cibiyar sadarwa. Wannan canjin yana ɗaukar matsakaiciyar haɗari kuma yana iya shafar wasu ayyukan aiki.
TweakWhy_NewAppPrompt: Lokacin da kake ƙoƙarin buɗe nau'in fayil ɗin da ba a haɗa shi ba, Windows yana nuna maganganu yana tambayar yadda ake buɗe shi. Kashewa yana kashe wannan tambayar.
TweakWhy_NewOutlook: Controls whether the new Outlook app is available. Kashe to keep using the classic Mail and Calendar apps instead.
TweakWhy_NewsInterests: Labarai da abun ciki na yanayi akan ma'aunin aiki
TweakWhy_Notifications: Babban canji don tsarin sanarwar Windows gaba ɗaya. Kashewa yana dakatar da duk sanarwar app kuma yana ɓoye cibiyar sanarwa. Wannan babban canji ne mai haɗari wanda zai iya zama mai wahala ko ba zai yuwu a juyo ba.
TweakWhy_NTFSLastAccess: Yana sabunta tambarin lokaci akan kowane fayil duk lokacin da aka karanta shi. Kashewa yana rage ayyukan rubuta faifai akan tsarin tare da yawancin ƙananan karatun fayil.
TweakWhy_NTFSLongPaths: Yana kawar da iyakar haruffa 260 akan hanyoyin fayil. Ana buƙata don wasu kayan aikin haɓakawa da ƙaƙƙarfan tsarin babban fayil.
TweakWhy_NumLock: Controls whether the Num Lock key is automatically turned on when Windows starts. Buje to always start with the number pad active.
TweakWhy_OneDrive: Yana shigar da abokin ciniki sync na OneDrive na kwamfyuta, ko cire app da haɗin kansa na Explorer. Cire shigarwa aiki ne na cire fakitin, ba mai canzawa mai sauƙi ba — dawo da shi na iya buƙatar sake gudanar da saitin, sake shiga, da jiran sync ya warke.
TweakWhy_OneDriveFileExplorerAd: OneDrive yana nuna sanarwar tallace-tallace a cikin File Explorer yana ƙarfafa ku ku daidaita fayiloli. Ɓoyewa yana cire wannan banner.
TweakWhy_OpenFileExplorerTo: Yana saita tsohuwar wurin Fayil Explorer yana buɗewa lokacin da aka ƙaddamar da shi daga ma'ajin aiki ko Fara Menu.
TweakWhy_OpenWindowsTerminalAdminContext: Buɗe Windows Terminal azaman admin ta tsohuwa
TweakWhy_OpenWindowsTerminalContext: 'Buɗe a cikin Windows Terminal' menu mahallin
TweakWhy_PerformanceTuning: Yana gudanar da saitin ingantaccen tsarin gado da gyare-gyaren saitin taya don inganta haɓakar tsarin gaba ɗaya. Wannan canjin yana ɗaukar matsakaiciyar haɗari kuma yana iya shafar wasu ayyukan aiki.
TweakWhy_PowerPlan: Sets the Windows power plan. Balanced scales performance based on load. Waje Performance keeps the CPU at full speed. Ultimate Performance removes all power-saving throttling for maximum throughput. Ultimate Performance may not be available on all systems.
TweakWhy_Powershell7Telemetry: PowerShell 7 sends anonymous usage data to Microsoft by default. Disabling opts out of this telemetry. Linked to the Sawa/Update PowerShell 7 option.
TweakWhy_PowerShellModulesLogging: Shigar da kowane umarni da ke gudana ta hanyar PowerShell module zuwa log ɗin taron Windows. Yana da amfani don duba tsaro da bincike abubuwan da suka faru.
TweakWhy_PowerShellScriptsLogging: Yana shigar da cikakken abun ciki na kowane toshe rubutun PowerShell wanda ke aiwatarwa zuwa log ɗin taron Windows. Taimakawa tare da binciken bayan faruwa.
TweakWhy_PreventEdgeShortcutCreation: Yana hana Microsoft Edge sake ƙirƙirar gajeriyar hanyar tebur bayan sabuntawa. Ya shafi duk tashoshi na saki Edge.
TweakWhy_PrintCMDContext: Nunas or hides the Print option in the right-click context menu for .bat and .cmd script files.
TweakWhy_ProtectClickOnce: Kashes ClickA bajece trust prompts for all security zones. Prevents untrusted ClickA bajece applications from prompting for installation. This is a high-risk change that may be difficult or impossible to reverse.
TweakWhy_ProtectFileSystemPerformance: Kashes 8.3 short filename generation on NTFS. Improves filesystem performance and removes a legacy compatibility feature rarely needed today.
TweakWhy_ProtectMSOffice: Restricts macros, external content execution, and Outlook trust settings across A kasuaice versions. Reduces document-based attack vectors. This is a high-risk change that may be difficult or impossible to reverse.
TweakWhy_ProtectMSOfficeLinks: Yana Hana Kalma daga sabunta hanyoyin haɗin waje ta atomatik a cikin takardu da imel. Yana rage haɗarin fitar da bayanai ta hanyar haɗin daftarin aiki. Wannan babban canji ne mai haɗari wanda zai iya zama mai wahala ko ba zai yuwu a juyo ba.
TweakWhy_ProtectOS: Aiwatar da faffadan saitin ƙima mai ƙarfi na rajista wanda ke rufe kariyar shaidar, UAC, NTLM, TCP/IP, da halayen cire katin wayo. Wannan babban canji ne mai haɗari wanda zai iya zama mai wahala ko ba zai yuwu a juyo ba.
TweakWhy_ProtectRPCSurface: Kashes RPC-over-TCP for Task Scheduler and the remote Service Control Manager. Reduces exposure for remote management attack paths. This is a high-risk change that may be difficult or impossible to reverse.
TweakWhy_ProtectWinRM: Kashes unencrypted WinRM traffic and digest authentication, then restarts the WinRM service. Ensures remote management connections are always encrypted. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_PrtScnSnippingTool: Yana sa maɓallin allo Print ya buɗe Kayan aikin Snipping don ɗaukar allo mai mu'amala maimakon yin kwafin shuru zuwa allo.
TweakWhy_PUAppsDetection: Bujes Defender to detect and quarantine potentially unwanted applications such as adware, bundleware, and browser hijackers. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_QoS: Mai tsara fakitin sabis na ingancin sabis na iya ba da fifiko ga wasu nau'ikan zirga-zirgar hanyar sadarwa. Ana buƙata don wasu fasalolin QoS na cibiyar sadarwa suyi aiki daidai.
TweakWhy_QuickAccessFrequentFolders: The Quick Access section in Explorer can show frequently visited folders. Ɓoye to keep Quick Access showing only your pinned folders.
TweakWhy_QuickAccessRecentFiles: The Quick Access section in Explorer can show recently opened files. Ɓoye to keep Quick Access showing only your pinned folders.
TweakWhy_RazerBlock: Yana toshe rubutun mai sakawa Razer Synapse daga aiki ta atomatik. Yana hana shigar da software na Razer mara so a bango. Wannan babban canji ne mai haɗari wanda zai iya zama mai wahala ko ba zai yuwu a juyo ba.
TweakWhy_RecentFiles: Controls whether Windows tracks recently accessed files for display in Quick Access and Open dialogs. Kashe to stop this tracking.
TweakWhy_RecentlyAddedApps: Nunas a list of recently installed apps in the Start Menu. Kashe to keep the Start Menu app list cleaner.
TweakWhy_RecentlyAddedStartApps: Abubuwan da aka ƙara kwanan nan a cikin Fara
TweakWhy_RecentShortcuts: Nunas recently and frequently accessed files and folders as shortcuts in the Explorer Quick Access section.
TweakWhy_RecommendedTroubleshooting: Controls whether Windows automatically runs troubleshooters when problems are detected. Abin da aka sako still asks for your permission before running.
TweakWhy_RecycleBinDeleteConfirmation: Nunas a confirmation prompt before moving files to the Recycle Bin. Buje to prevent accidental deletion.
TweakWhy_RegistryBackup: Bujes automatic periodic backup of the Windows registry hive files to the RegBack folder inside the Windows directory.
TweakWhy_RepairSharedPrinterConnectionEr: Yana gyara gazawar haɗin haɗin firinta na gama gari da abokin ciniki ta hanyar daidaita RPC, SMB, Point and Print, spooler, TCP, da saitunan gano hanyar sadarwa. Wannan canjin yana ɗaukar matsakaiciyar haɗari kuma yana buƙatar sake farawa.
TweakWhy_RepairWindows11SMBUpdateIssue: Yana gyara wani sanannen batun a wasu Windows 11 yana gina inda SMB damar samun damar shiga ta kasa bayan sabuntawa saboda ƙimar rajistar da ta ɓace.
TweakWhy_ReservedStorage: Windows tana tanadin gigabytes na sarari diski da yawa don sabuntawa, fayilolin wucin gadi, da caches. Kashe yana maido da wannan keɓaɓɓen sarari bayan sabuntawa na gaba. Wannan canjin yana ɗaukar matsakaiciyar haɗari kuma yana iya shafar wasu ayyukan aiki.
TweakWhy_RestartDeviceAfterUpdate: Yana ba da damar Windows don tsara sake farawa da wuri-wuri bayan kammala shigarwar sabuntawa.
TweakWhy_RestartNotification: Nunas a notification in the taskbar when a Windows Update has been installed and requires a restart to complete.
TweakWhy_RestoreFldrWindows: Yana sake buɗe duk wani babban fayil ɗin Explorer windows waɗanda ke buɗe lokacin da kuka kashe ƙarshe. Yana dawo da mahallin aikin ku akan kowane shiga.
TweakWhy_RevertStartMenu: Yana mayar da Fara Menu zuwa shimfidar pre-24H2 akan Windows 11 24H2 yana ginawa. Yana iya shafar daidaituwa tare da sabuntawar Windows na gaba. Wannan babban canji ne mai haɗari wanda zai iya zama mai wahala ko ba zai yuwu a juyo ba.
TweakWhy_S3Sleep: S3 barci ne mai zurfi na gargajiya inda PC ke ba da ikon saukar da abubuwan da aka gyara. Wasu tsare-tsare sun saba zuwa jiran aiki na zamani waɗanda zasu iya zubar da wuta yayin zaman banza.
TweakWhy_SaveRestartableApps: Windows na iya ajiye yanayin buɗe aikace-aikacen lokacin da ka fita kuma ka sake buɗe su ta atomatik bayan shiga na gaba.
TweakWhy_SaveZoneInformation: Lokacin da ka zazzage fayil daga intanit, Windows tana sanya shi da alamar yanki. Tsayar da wannan kunna yana ba da damar faɗakarwar tsaro yayin gudanar da fayilolin da aka sauke.
TweakWhy_ScheduledTasks: Yawancin ayyuka da aka tsara suna gudana a bango don tattarawa da loda bayanan bincike. Kashewa yana dakatar da waɗannan ayyuka daga gudana ta atomatik. Wannan canjin yana ɗaukar matsakaiciyar haɗari kuma yana iya shafar wasu ayyukan aiki.
TweakWhy_SearchAppInStore: Lokacin da ka buɗe fayil tare da tsawo wanda ba a sani ba, Windows na iya ba da shawarar dubawa a cikin Shagon Microsoft. Kashewa ya tsallake wannan shawarar.
TweakWhy_SearchHighlights: Nemo karin bayanai a cikin Binciken Windows
TweakWhy_SelectCheckboxes: Yana ƙara akwatunan rajistan shiga kusa da fayiloli da manyan fayiloli a cikin Explorer don sauƙin zaɓi mai yawa ba tare da buƙatar riƙe Ctrl ba.
TweakWhy_Sensors: Yana sarrafa damar zuwa na'urori masu auna firikwensin kamar accelerometer, gyroscope, da firikwensin haske na yanayi. Mafi dacewa ga allunan da na'urori masu iya canzawa.
TweakWhy_ServicesManual: Yana saita zaɓi na ayyukan Windows marasa mahimmanci daga atomatik zuwa farawa na hannu. Har yanzu ayyuka za su fara kan buƙata lokacin da ake buƙata. Wannan canjin yana ɗaukar matsakaiciyar haɗari kuma yana iya shafar wasu ayyukan aiki.
TweakWhy_SetDefenderExploitGuardPolicy: Yana aiki da ƙarin ƙa'idodin rage girman kai hari ta hanyar Windows Defender don toshe dabarun malware na gama gari. Wannan babban canji ne mai haɗari wanda zai iya zama mai wahala ko ba zai yuwu a juyo ba.
TweakWhy_SetDLLHijackingPrevention: Yana saita odar neman DLL Manager Session don hana aikace-aikace daga loda DLLs daga wuraren da ba a amince da su ba. Yana rufe hanyar isar da malware gama gari. Wannan canjin yana ɗaukar matsakaiciyar haɗari kuma yana iya shafar wasu ayyukan aiki.
TweakWhy_SetLOLBinFirewallRules: Yana ƙara ƙa'idodin toshe bangon wuta na waje don ginanniyar Windows binaries da malware (LOLBins) ke cin zarafi zuwa gidan waya ko zazzage abubuwan biya. Wannan babban canji ne mai haɗari wanda zai iya zama mai wahala ko ba zai yuwu a juyo ba.
TweakWhy_SetNtpServerOverride: Yana soke Lokacin Windows don amfani da pool.ntp.org maimakon tsohuwar uwar garken lokacin Windows.
TweakWhy_SetSMBSharingCompatibility: Yana adana tsarin raba SMB ɗin ku na yanzu da adana bayanan cibiyar sadarwa lokacin da ake amfani da wasu tweaks na cibiyar sadarwa. Wannan canjin yana ɗaukar matsakaiciyar haɗari kuma yana iya shafar wasu ayyukan aiki.
TweakWhy_SettingsSuggestedContent: Aikace-aikacen Saituna na iya nuna shawarwari da shawarwari da aka tallafa tare da saitunanku. Boye yana cire wannan abun cikin talla.
TweakWhy_SetWindowsFirewallLogging: Bujes logging of dropped and allowed connections to the Windows Firewall log file so you can audit network activity.
TweakWhy_SharedExperiences: Yana ba da damar Windows don raba ayyuka tsakanin na'urorinku ta asusun Microsoft ɗin ku. Kashe yana kiyaye ayyuka na gida ga wannan injin kawai.
TweakWhy_ShareMenu: Yana ƙara zaɓin Raba zuwa menu na mahallin danna dama don fayiloli, yana ba ku damar raba su ta aikace-aikace ko rabawa na kusa da Windows.
TweakWhy_SharingMappedDrives: Yana ba da damar abubuwan tafiyar da taswirar cibiyar sadarwa su kasance a bayyane ga matakai masu ɗaukaka (mai gudanarwa) da kuma mai amfani na yanzu. Wannan canjin yana ɗaukar matsakaiciyar haɗari kuma yana iya shafar wasu ayyukan aiki.
TweakWhy_SharingWizard: Bujes the simplified file sharing wizard when you right-click a file or folder and choose to share it.
TweakWhy_ShortcutArrow: Nunas or hides the small arrow overlay icon on shortcut files to indicate they are shortcuts and not the original files.
TweakWhy_ShortcutsSuffix: Yana sarrafa ko Windows ta haɗa - Gajerar hanyar zuwa sunan sabbin gajerun hanyoyin da aka ƙirƙira akan tebur.
TweakWhy_ShutdownFromLockScreen: Yana sarrafa ko maɓallan rufewa da sake farawa suna bayyane akan allon kulle Windows.
TweakWhy_SigninInfo: Uses your sign-in credentials to automatically finish setting up your profile after a Windows update. Kashe for more privacy.
TweakWhy_SleepButton: Yana sarrafa ko zaɓin barci yana bayyana a cikin Fara Menu da kuma ko maɓallin madannai na barci yana aiki.
TweakWhy_SleepTimeout: Controls when the display turns off and when the PC enters sleep mode after inactivity. Kashe to prevent automatic sleep.
TweakWhy_SMB1: SMBv1 is an outdated and vulnerable file sharing protocol known for EternalBlue exploits. Kashe unless required for very old network devices. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_SMBServer: Bujes the SMB file server component that lets other computers on the network access shared folders and printers on this PC. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_SnapAssist: When you snap a window to one side, Windows suggests other open windows to fill the remaining space. Kashe to snap without suggestions.
TweakWhy_StandbyFix: Jiran aiki na zamani (S0) na iya haifar da babban CPU da amfani da wutar lantarki yayin da PC ya bayyana yana barci. Wannan gyara yana canzawa zuwa yanayin barci mai zurfi na salon S3.
TweakWhy_StartAccountNotifications: Microsoft na iya nuna sanarwar da ke da alaƙa da asusu da faɗakarwa a cikin Fara Menu. Boye yana kawar da waɗannan.
TweakWhy_StartLayout: Yana sarrafa tsarin shimfidar wuri na Windows 11 Fara Menu tsakanin aikace-aikacen da aka haɗa da abun ciki da aka ba da shawarar.
TweakWhy_StartMenuAllSectionCategories: Duk sashe tare da rukunoni a cikin Fara (24H2+)
TweakWhy_StartRecommendationsTips: Menu na Fara yana iya nuna nasihu game da fasalulluka na Windows da shawarwarin sabbin ƙa'idodi. Boye yana cire waɗannan shawarwari.
TweakWhy_StartRecommendedSection: Nunas or hides the Ana ba da shawarar section at the bottom of the Start Menu. A baje Enterprise and Education editions this can be hidden via policy.
TweakWhy_StartupSound: Yana kunna sautin farawa na Windows lokacin da tebur ya yi lodi bayan shiga.
TweakWhy_StickyShift: Pressing Shift five times quickly triggers the Sticky Keys accessibility dialog. Kashe to prevent this from interrupting your work.
TweakWhy_StorageSense: Yana 'yantar da sarari faifai ta atomatik akan jadawali ta hanyar share fayilolin wucin gadi, tsoffin abubuwan zazzagewa, da Recycle Bin abinda ke ciki.
TweakWhy_Superfetch: SysMain preloads frequently used apps into RAM to speed up launch times. A baje SSDs it provides little benefit and can usually be safely disabled. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_SuperHiddenFiles: Nunas protected Windows system files in File Explorer. These are hidden by default to prevent accidental modification or deletion.
TweakWhy_SuspendAirstrikeAttack: Ɓoyes the network selection UI from the Windows lock screen. Prevents changing network settings before signing in. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_SyncNotifications: OneDrive da sauran masu samar da sync na iya nuna sanarwar tallace-tallace a cikin Explorer. Kashe don ɓoye waɗannan banners.
TweakWhy_TailoredExperiences: Yana amfani da bayanan binciken ku don nuna keɓaɓɓen shawarwari, tallace-tallace, da shawarwari daga Microsoft. Kashewa ya fitar da ku.
TweakWhy_TaskbarEndTask: Ƙara Ƙarshen ɗawainiya zuwa menu na mahallin ɗawainiya
TweakWhy_TaskManagerDetails: Buɗe Manajan ɗawainiya kai tsaye zuwa shafin Cikakkun bayanai yana nuna duk matakai maimakon ƙayyadaddun duban taƙaitaccen bayani.
TweakWhy_TaskViewButton: Maɓallin Duba ɗawainiya akan ma'aunin ɗawainiya
TweakWhy_Teredo: Teredo ƙa'idar tunneling ce wacce ke ba da haɗin kai na IPv6 akan cibiyoyin sadarwar IPv4. Da ake buƙata don haɗin Xbox Live da wasu aikace-aikacen ɗan-ɗan-tsara. Wannan babban canji ne mai haɗari wanda zai iya zama mai wahala ko ba zai yuwu a juyo ba.
TweakWhy_ThisPC: Nunas or hides the This PC icon on your desktop for quick access to drives and devices.
TweakWhy_ThumbnailCache: Windows yana adana samfoti na thumbnail a cikin ɓoyayyun fayil ɗin bayanai don hanzarta binciken babban fayil. Kashewa yana hana adana wannan cache akan faifai.
TweakWhy_Thumbnails: Nunas image and video previews as thumbnails in Explorer instead of generic file type icons. Disabling shows icons only.
TweakWhy_ThumbsDBOnNetwork: Windows yana ƙirƙira ɓoyayyun fayilolin Thumb.db akan hannun jari na cibiyar sadarwa zuwa manyan hotuna. Kashewa yana hana ƙirƙirar waɗannan fayilolin akan wuraren cibiyar sadarwa.
TweakWhy_TitleBarColor: Launuka sandunan taken taga don dacewa da launin lafazin Windows ɗinku maimakon nuna su cikin farar fata ko launin toka.
TweakWhy_TrayIcons: Nunas all notification area icons in the system tray instead of hiding overflow icons behind the expand arrow.
TweakWhy_UnknownNetworks: Yana saita tsohuwar bayanin martabar cibiyar sadarwar da aka yi amfani da su zuwa sabbin hanyoyin haɗin yanar gizo ko waɗanda ba a gane su ba lokacin da aka fara gano su. Wannan canjin yana ɗaukar matsakaiciyar haɗari kuma yana iya shafar wasu ayyukan aiki.
TweakWhy_UpdateAdobereaderDCSTIG: Yana aiwatar da saitin tsare-tsaren tsare-tsare na Adobe Reader DC gami da yanayin kariya, kariya mai kariya, da kashe gizagizai da fasalulluka na yanar gizo. Wannan babban canji ne mai haɗari wanda zai iya zama mai wahala ko ba zai yuwu a juyo ba.
TweakWhy_UpdateAutoDownload: Yana sarrafa ko Windows Update yana saukewa ta atomatik a bango. Kashewa yana baka damar zaɓar lokacin da za a sauke sabuntawa. Wannan canjin yana ɗaukar matsakaiciyar haɗari kuma yana iya shafar wasu ayyukan aiki.
TweakWhy_UpdateCipherSuites: Yana saita fitattun SCHANNEL cipher suites zuwa bambance-bambancen AES-256 da AES-128. Yana tabbatar da ɓoye mai ƙarfi don duk haɗin TLS. Wannan canjin yana ɗaukar matsakaiciyar haɗari kuma yana iya shafar wasu ayyukan aiki.
TweakWhy_UpdateDesktopRegistry: Yana kawar da ƙaramin gunkin bayanin da ke bayyana akan tebur lokacin da fuskar bangon waya ta Windows Spotlight ke aiki.
TweakWhy_UpdateDotNetStrongAuth: Ƙarfafa .NET Tsarin 4.x da 2.x don amfani da TLS-tsoffin tsarin da ƙaƙƙarfan cryptography. Yana hana tsofaffin aikace-aikacen NET . Wannan canjin yana ɗaukar matsakaiciyar haɗari kuma yana iya shafar wasu ayyukan aiki.
TweakWhy_UpdateDriver: Yana sarrafa ko Windows Update yana saukewa da shigar da direbobin kayan aiki ta atomatik. Kashewa yana baka damar sarrafa direbobi da hannu. Wannan canjin yana ɗaukar matsakaiciyar haɗari kuma yana iya shafar wasu ayyukan aiki.
TweakWhy_UpdateEventLogSize: Yana ƙara girman girman log ɗin taron Tsaro na Windows zuwa 1 MB. Yana taimakawa riƙe ƙarin abubuwan dubawa kafin a sake rubuta tsofaffin abubuwan shiga.
TweakWhy_UpdateKeyExchanges: Bujes Diffie-Hellman, ECDH, and PKCS key exchange algorithms in SCHANNEL. Ensures forward-secure key exchange is available for TLS connections. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_UpdateMicrosoftProducts: Lokacin da aka kunna, Sabuntawar Windows kuma yana bincika da shigar da sabuntawa don wasu software na Microsoft da aka shigar tare da sabuntawar Windows.
TweakWhy_UpdateMSProducts: When enabled, Windows Update also checks for updates to other Microsoft products like A kasuaice. Disabling limits updates to Windows only.
TweakWhy_UpdateMSRT: Yana sarrafa ko Sabuntawar Windows yana ba da sikanin Kayan aikin Cire Software na Malicious. Kashewa yana hana tura shi ta Windows Update. Wannan canjin yana ɗaukar matsakaiciyar haɗari kuma yana iya shafar wasu ayyukan aiki.
TweakWhy_UpdatePowershell: PowerShell 7 harsashi ne na zamani na giciye tare da ingantaccen aiki da fasali akan ginannen Windows PowerShell 5.1. An haɗa zuwa PS7 Telemetry toggle.
TweakWhy_UpdateProtocols: TLS 1.0 da 1.1 sun lalace tare da sanannun lahani. Kashe su yana taurare tsarin daga BEAST, POODLE, da hare-hare masu alaƙa. Ya kamata a sake kunnawa kawai don dacewa da gado.
TweakWhy_UpdateRegistryPaths: Yana ƙirƙira duk wasu hanyoyin yin rajista da suka ɓace waɗanda wasu tweaks masu tauri suke buƙata kafin su gudu. Wannan mataki ne da ake buqata ba tare da ganuwa na fuskantar mai amfani ba.
TweakWhy_UpdateRestart: Yana hana Windows sake farawa ta atomatik bayan shigar da sabuntawa ba tare da shigar da ku ba. Yana ba ku iko akan lokacin sake kunnawa ya faru.
TweakWhy_UseStoreOpenWith: Nunas or hides the Look for an app in the Microsoft Store option that appears in the Open With dialog for unassociated file types.
TweakWhy_UWPAccountInfo: Yana sarrafa ko aikace-aikacen UWP na iya samun dama ga sunan asusun ku, hoto, da sauran bayanan asusun ku.
TweakWhy_UWPApps: Yana buɗe maganganun zaɓi don cirewa ko mayar da zaɓaɓɓun ƙa'idodin Store Store na Windows. Wasu cirewar hanya ɗaya ce, har ma da goyan bayan hanyoyin dawowa na iya buƙatar Shagon Microsoft, winget, ko sake shigar da bibiya ta hannu. Wannan fakitin babban haɗari ne maimakon juyawa mai sauƙi.
TweakWhy_UWPCalendar: Yana sarrafa ko aikace-aikacen UWP na iya karantawa da rubutawa zuwa bayanan kalandarku.
TweakWhy_UWPCallHistory: Yana sarrafa ko aikace-aikacen UWP na iya karanta tarihin kiran ku.
TweakWhy_UWPContacts: Yana sarrafa ko aikace-aikacen UWP na iya samun damar lissafin lambobin ku.
TweakWhy_UWPDiagInfo: Yana sarrafa ko aikace-aikacen UWP na iya tattara bayanan bincike game da na'urarka da yanayinta.
TweakWhy_UWPEmail: Yana sarrafa ko aikace-aikacen UWP na iya karantawa da aika imel a madadin ku.
TweakWhy_UWPFileSystem: Yana sarrafa ko aikace-aikacen UWP na iya samun damar fayiloli a ko'ina akan tsarin fayil ɗin ku fiye da nasu manyan fayilolin app. Wannan canjin yana ɗaukar matsakaiciyar haɗari kuma yana iya shafar wasu ayyukan aiki.
TweakWhy_UWPMessaging: Yana sarrafa ko aikace-aikacen UWP na iya karantawa da aika saƙonnin rubutu.
TweakWhy_UWPNotifications: Yana sarrafa ko aikace-aikacen UWP na iya aika sanarwa zuwa cibiyar sanarwar Windows.
TweakWhy_UWPOtherDevices: Yana sarrafa ko ƙa'idodin UWP za su iya samun dama ga wasu na'urori da aka haɗe waɗanda ba su rufe ta da takamaiman nau'ikan.
TweakWhy_UWPPhoneCalls: Yana sarrafa ko aikace-aikacen UWP na iya yin da sarrafa kiran waya.
TweakWhy_UWPRadios: Yana sarrafa ko aikace-aikacen UWP na iya sarrafa Bluetooth da sauran na'urorin rediyo mara waya.
TweakWhy_UWPSwapFile: Fayil ɗin musanya ta UWP (swapfile.sys) kayan aikin Windows Store ne ke amfani da shi don rubutun ƙwaƙwalwar ajiya na kama-da-wane. Kashewa yana 'yantar da sararin faifai idan ba ka amfani da ƙa'idodin Store. Wannan canjin yana ɗaukar matsakaiciyar haɗari kuma yana iya shafar wasu ayyukan aiki.
TweakWhy_UWPTasks: Yana sarrafa ko ƙa'idodin UWP za su iya samun dama ga ayyukanku da lissafin abubuwan yi.
TweakWhy_UWPVoiceActivation: Yana sarrafa ko ana iya kunna aikace-aikacen UWP ta amfani da umarnin murya a bango.
TweakWhy_VerboseStatus: Nunas detailed status messages during Windows startup and shutdown instead of just the generic loading spinner.
TweakWhy_VisualFX: Yana sarrafa saitin tasirin gani gaba ɗaya. Aiki yana hana raye-raye don jin daɗi. Bayyanar yana ba da damar duk tasiri.
TweakWhy_WAPPush: Sabis ɗin aika saƙon WAP Push yana karɓar saƙonnin kan iska daga masu ɗaukar wayar hannu. Ba kasafai ake buƙata akan PC ba a haɗa shi da hanyar sadarwa ta hannu.
TweakWhy_WebLangList: Syncs your preferred language list to a Microsoft server so web content can match your preferences. Kashe for more privacy.
TweakWhy_WebSearch: Haɗa sakamakon gidan yanar gizon Bing zuwa mashaya binciken Windows. Kashewa yana sa binciken tsarin ya nuna fayiloli da saitunan gida kawai.
TweakWhy_WhatsNewInWindows: Nunas banners and prompts highlighting new Windows features after updates. Kashe to suppress these notifications.
TweakWhy_WiFiSense: WiFi Sense na iya raba kalmar sirri ta WiFi ta atomatik tare da lambobin sadarwar ku. Kashewa yana hana wannan halin rabawa.
TweakWhy_Win32LongPathLimit: Yana kawar da iyakar iyakar haruffa 260 don aikace-aikacen Win32. Da ake buƙata don wasu kayan aikin haɓakawa da hadadden tsarin babban fayil.
TweakWhy_WindowsCapabilities: Yana buɗe maganganun zaɓin fasali don ƙara ko cire damar Windows kamar fakitin harshe ko kayan aikin RSAT. Maidowa na iya buƙatar samun damar Sabuntawar Windows, fayilolin tushe, ko sake farawa da bibiya, don haka yakamata a kula da wannan azaman sarrafa fakiti maimakon sauƙi mai sauƙi.
TweakWhy_WindowsColorMode: Sets whether the Windows shell (taskbar, Start Menu, action center) uses Duhu or Haske mode.
TweakWhy_WindowsFeatures: Yana buɗe fasalin Kunna ko kashe maganganun Windows don kunna ko kashe abubuwan haɗin Windows na zaɓi kamar Hyper-V ko Telnet. Wannan canjin yana ɗaukar matsakaiciyar haɗari kuma yana iya shafar wasu ayyukan aiki.
TweakWhy_WindowsGameMode: Wannan yana sarrafa ginannen yanayin Yanayin Wasan Windows, ba aikin bayanin martabar Gaming na Baseline ba. Yanayin Wasan Windows yana ba da fifikon tsarin wasan kuma yana murkushe ayyukan bango.
